meaning: Product readiness receipt. This proves public setup paths, source mirrors, local host MCP contracts, hosted read-only MCP, connection kits and Bankr agent-proof assets. It does not claim third-party adoption or marketplace acceptance.
criteria: agent discovery documents expose exact setup commands
local MCP server lists all expected tools
hosted read-only MCP lists only safe registry tools
read-only and controlled-write tools are separated
proof package can be found, inspected and install-planned
no secrets or payment requirement are needed for core package workflows

platforms.name: GitHub
platforms.claim: Public open-source mirror and contribution surface.
checks: git ls-remote origin refs/heads/main matches the released commit

platforms.name: Gitlawb
platforms.claim: Gitlawb source flow, package claim verification workflow and package archive paths are live.
checks: git ls-remote gitlawb refs/heads/main matches the released commit
nipmod claim index --node https://node.nipmod.com --json reports verified, invalid and missing owner claims without treating missing proofs as verified
nipmod publish . --dry-run --json

platforms.name: MCP
platforms.claim: The local Nipmod MCP server exposes the expected package tools for agent runtimes, and the hosted endpoint exposes a read-only registry subset.
checks: nipmod mcp serve exposes the expected tool list
https://nipmod.com/api/mcp exposes only search, view, inspect, install_plan and demo
read-only and controlled-write tools are separated

platforms.name: Codex
platforms.claim: Codex can register Nipmod as a local stdio MCP server through one Nipmod setup command.
checks: nipmod setup codex delegates to the Codex MCP registration path
codex mcp get shows command nipmod and args mcp serve
nipmod mcp serve exposes the expected tool list

platforms.name: Claude Code
platforms.claim: Claude Code can load the committed project .mcp.json and connect to Nipmod.
checks: nipmod setup claude writes a project scoped .mcp.json
project .mcp.json contains nipmod stdio config
claude mcp list reports nipmod connected when nipmod is on PATH

platforms.name: Cursor
platforms.claim: Cursor can connect to Nipmod through project MCP config or the Add to Cursor deeplink.
platforms.verifyCommand: Open Cursor Settings > MCP or run cursor-agent mcp list
checks: Cursor documents project MCP setup through .cursor/mcp.json
Cursor documents MCP install deeplinks
nipmod setup cursor writes a project scoped .cursor/mcp.json
project .cursor/mcp.json contains nipmod stdio command and preserves other MCP servers
https://nipmod.com/cursor publishes the Add to Cursor deeplink and official claim boundary

platforms.name: OpenCode
platforms.claim: OpenCode can load the committed opencode.json and connect to Nipmod.
checks: official OpenCode config schema accepts local MCP command arrays
project opencode.json contains nipmod local MCP config
opencode mcp list reports nipmod connected when nipmod is on PATH

platforms.name: Hermes
platforms.claim: Hermes can load Nipmod as a local stdio MCP server and use a local /nipmod skill bundle.
platforms.verifyCommand: hermes mcp test nipmod && hermes bundles list
checks: nipmod setup hermes writes mcp_servers.nipmod without replacing unrelated config
nipmod setup hermes writes ~/.hermes/skills/nipmod/SKILL.md
nipmod setup hermes writes ~/.hermes/skill-bundles/nipmod.yaml for /nipmod
Nipmod MCP server exposes the expected tool list
isolated Hermes v0.14.0 runtime smoke discovered all 14 Nipmod MCP tools with hermes mcp test nipmod
platforms.externalDependency: NousResearch acknowledgement is external before native, official or partner wording is valid.

platforms.name: Bankr
platforms.claim: Bankr-compatible skill, free service map and agent-proof workflow are public and runnable without wallet actions.
checks: skill can be read from the public site
proof package can be searched, inspected and install-planned
real Bankr Agent API smoke is available with BANKR_API_KEY
core package workflows do not require x402 or Nipmod payment
platforms.externalDependency: Native Bankr catalog acceptance and authenticated Bankr Agent API execution are external and not claimed without Bankr auth.

platforms.name: Aeon
platforms.claim: Aeon is a strong external skill library candidate for a future Nipmod collection, pending owner review.
checks: candidate repo is public
no owner approval or package publication is claimed
platforms.externalDependency: Aeon owner review and consent are required before any Aeon skill collection is published through Nipmod.

platforms.name: OpenHuman
platforms.claim: OpenHuman is a strong agent-harness candidate for a future Nipmod connection, pending Tiny Humans owner review.
checks: candidate repo is public
repo exposes agent-facing surfaces such as .agents, .claude and .codex
no owner approval, native support or package publication is claimed
platforms.externalDependency: Tiny Humans owner review and consent are required before any official OpenHuman support or OpenHuman-owned package listing is claimed.

notClaimed: third-party users have already adopted every host
every Gitlawb package has a verified Owner Package Claim proof
Bankr has accepted the skill into a native marketplace
Bankr Agent API smoke has run unless BANKR_API_KEY is provided
Aeon has approved or published a Nipmod skill collection
OpenHuman has approved, endorsed or published a Nipmod connection
wallet, trading, token launch or paid x402 workflows are part of core package use
